data.name: Elranatamab (PF-06863135)
data.description: A novel bispecific antibody targeting BCMA on MM cells and CD3 on T-cells for the treatment of relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma (RRMM).

data.name: Acetaminophen
data.description: Required premedication for Cytokine Release Syndrome (CRS) prophylaxis.

data.name: Paracetamol
data.description: Required premedication for Cytokine Release Syndrome (CRS) prophylaxis (alternative to acetaminophen).

data.name: Diphenhydramine
data.description: Required premedication for Cytokine Release Syndrome (CRS) prophylaxis.

data.name: Dexamethasone
data.description: Required premedication for Cytokine Release Syndrome (CRS) prophylaxis.

data.name: Antibacterial agents
data.description: Permitted for infection prophylaxis in participants at increased risk of infection.

data.name: Anti-fungal agents
data.description: Permitted for infection prophylaxis in participants at increased risk of infection.

data.name: Antiviral agents
data.description: Permitted for infection prophylaxis in participants at increased risk of infection.

data.name: Intravenous immunoglobulin
data.description: Permitted for management of IgG levels <400 mg/dL.

data.name: COVID-19 vaccines
data.description: Permitted for COVID-19 prevention.

data.name: PAXLOVIDTM
data.description: Permitted for treatment of COVID-19 infection.

data.name: Monoclonal antibody treatments (for COVID-19)
data.description: Permitted for treatment of COVID-19 infection.

data.name: Hormonal contraceptives
data.description: Permitted for women of childbearing potential (WOCBP) for contraception.

data.name: Investigational drug (prior)
data.description: Any investigational drug administered within 30 days or 5 half-lives (whichever is longer) prior to the first dose of study intervention.

data.name: Live attenuated vaccine (prior)
data.description: Live attenuated vaccine administered within 4 weeks of the first dose of study intervention.

data.name: Elranatamab 76 mg SC QW
data.duration: Starting C1D8 for at least 6 cycles, until confirmed disease progression, unacceptable toxicity, withdrawal of consent, or study termination.

data.name: Elranatamab 76 mg SC Q2W
data.duration: After at least 6 cycles of QW dosing, if PR or better for ≥2 months, until confirmed disease progression, unacceptable toxicity, withdrawal of consent, or study termination.

data.name: Acetaminophen 650 mg for CRS prophylaxis
data.doseFrequency: Once, 60 minutes (±15 minutes) prior to C1D1, C1D4, and C1D8

data.name: Paracetamol 500 mg for CRS prophylaxis
data.doseFrequency: Once, 60 minutes (±15 minutes) prior to C1D1, C1D4, and C1D8

data.name: Diphenhydramine 25 mg for CRS prophylaxis
data.doseFrequency: Once, 60 minutes (±15 minutes) prior to C1D1, C1D4, and C1D8

data.name: Dexamethasone 20 mg for CRS prophylaxis
data.doseFrequency: Once, 60 minutes (±15 minutes) prior to C1D1, C1D4, and C1D8

data.name: Elranatamab
data.description: Active pharmaceutical ingredient of the investigational product, a bispecific antibody.

data.name: Acetaminophen
data.description: Active ingredient for CRS prophylaxis.

data.name: Paracetamol
data.description: Active ingredient for CRS prophylaxis (alternative to acetaminophen).

data.name: Diphenhydramine
data.description: Active ingredient for CRS prophylaxis.

data.name: Dexamethasone
data.description: Active ingredient for CRS prophylaxis.

data.name: Immunoglobulin
data.description: Active ingredient for managing hypogammaglobulinemia.
